name: FlightAware Aviation Intelligence API
what_it_does: FlightAware aviation intelligence REST and streaming API for aviation operators, airlines, airports, and enterprise logistics to access real-time ADS-B flight tracking, predictive gate arrival times, turbulence forecasts, historical flight records, and global aviation data — acquired by Collins Aerospace (Raytheon Technologies) and powering mission-critical aviation operations for airlines, FBOs, and logistics companies. Enables AI agents to manage real-time flight tracking for aviation operations automation, handle ADS-B position data for aircraft monitoring automation, access predictive ETA for gate arrival automation, retrieve turbulence forecast for flight planning automation, manage historical flight for analytics automation, handle airport operations data for FBO management automation, access delay prediction for operations planning automation, retrieve fuel efficiency data for airline cost automation, manage fleet monitoring for corporate aviation automation, and integrate FlightAware with airline ops, ground handler, and corporate flight department platforms for enterprise aviation automation.
use_cases: Tracking real-time aircraft positions for airline operations and ground handling coordination automation agents
Accessing ADS-B flight data for FBO and general aviation fuel and services pre-positioning automation agents
Predicting gate arrival times and delays for airport operations resource planning automation agents
Monitoring corporate and charter flight schedules for private aviation management automation agents
not_for: Consumer flight status apps at scale without commercial agreement (FlightAware commercial API is enterprise-priced)
Flight booking or ticketing (FlightAware is data/intelligence, not a booking platform)
ATC operational system replacement (FlightAware is intelligence layer, not certified ATC system)
best_when: An airline, airport operator, FBO, or corporate flight department wanting AI agents to access real-time ADS-B tracking, predictive ETAs, and aviation intelligence through FlightAware's Collins Aerospace-backed aviation platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE PRICING: FlightAware's commercial API (AeroAPI) is enterprise-priced; automated cheap or free API assumption creates significant budget impact; automated commercial aviation deployments must plan for FlightAware commercial pricing. STREAMING VS REST: FlightAware offers both REST (AeroAPI) and streaming (Firehose) for different use cases; automated REST-for-real-time-tracking assumption creates polling overhead; automated real-time continuous tracking should use Firehose streaming, not REST polling. COLLINS AEROSPACE OWNERSHIP: FlightAware acquired by Collins Aerospace (RTX subsidiary) 2021; automated independent company assumption should account for enterprise sales process; automated enterprise deployments should engage Collins Aerospace commercial team. IATA/ICAO CODE DISTINCTIONS: FlightAware uses both IATA (3-letter) and ICAO (4-letter) airport/airline codes; automated single code format assumption creates airport_not_found; automated must use correct code format per endpoint.

auth.notes: FlightAware uses API key (x-apikey header) for AeroAPI authentication. REST API + Firehose streaming. Houston, TX HQ. Founded 2005 by Daniel Baker. Acquired by Collins Aerospace (RTX) 2021. Products: AeroAPI (REST), Firehose (streaming), FBO Toolbox, TurboScratch. SDKs: None official. ADS-B network covering 90%+ of global commercial aviation. 10,000+ commercial aviation data customers. Mission-critical airline operations data. Competes with SITA and Cirium for aviation intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free personal use tier: 10,000 flight queries/month; commercial use requires enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Personal $0, Plus $49.95/month, Commercial: contact sales; Firehose: enterprise agreement
pricing.notes: Houston TX. Collins Aerospace/RTX subsidiary. Free personal tier. Commercial enterprise pricing. Aviation intelligence.

performance.rate_limits: Calls per month by plan; Firehose continuous streaming; REST polling rate limits per plan

known_agent_gotchas: REST VS FIREHOSE FOR DIFFERENT PATTERNS: FlightAware AeroAPI (REST) is for query-based access; Firehose is for real-time streaming; automated REST polling for continuous tracking creates unnecessary latency and quota consumption; automated continuous tracking should use Firehose, not AeroAPI polling

FLIGHT IDENTIFIER FORMATS: FlightAware accepts ICAO call signs, IATA flight numbers, and registration numbers; automated single identifier format assumption creates fa_flight_id_not_found; automated must use correct identifier format for each query type

COMMERCIAL USE REQUIRES COMMERCIAL PLAN: Free personal tier explicitly prohibits commercial use; automated commercial deployment on free tier creates terms of service violation; automated commercial apps must upgrade to commercial plan

AIRCRAFT IDENT REQUIRED FOR TRACKING: FlightAware flight tracking requires knowing aircraft identifier or flight number; automated position-only without identifier assumption creates missing flight context; automated must resolve flight identifier before tracking

PAGINATION IS CURSOR-BASED: FlightAware flight history uses cursor pagination for large result sets; automated single-page all-results assumption creates incomplete historical data; automated must implement cursor-based pagination for historical queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Aviation intelligence. GDPR, aviation data license. API key. US. Flight position and operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aviation intelligence. GDPR. API key in header. US. Flight and aircraft operations data.
